授業方法: Seminar. Based on weekly readings and class discussions, students will gain a broad understanding of Modern Japan. At the beginning of each class students will present a summary of the assigned readings followed by class discussions that will be supplemented by materials from the instructor.

第1回:
【Startup Week】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Introduction and Orientation
第2回:
【Core Week 1】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Japan’s Development after World War II: Hiroshima and Post-War Japan.
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第3回:
【Core Week 2】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Cultural and Social Changes
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第4回:
【Core Week 3】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Life on the Margins: Homeless, Working Poor and Day Laborers
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第5回:
【Core Week 4】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: From Rural to Urban: Community and Neighborhood
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第6回:
【Core Week 5】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Interactive Class with Japanese Students
Preparation for class with Japanese students.
第7回:
【Core Week 6】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Interactive Class with Japanese Students
Preparation for class with Japanese students.
第8回:
【Core Week 7】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Interactive Class with Japanese Students
Preparation for class with Japanese students.
第9回:
【Core Week 8】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Interactive Class with Japanese Students
Preparation for class with Japanese students.
第10回:
【Core Week 9】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Disaster Prevention and Natural Disasters in Japan
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第11回:
【Core Week 10】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Field Trip: The Great Hanshin Earthquake Memorial Museum and Disaster Reduction Center, Kobe
Preparation for field trip. Duration about 4 hours.
第12回:
【Core Week 11】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Exporting Japan: Media Culture and its perception in East Asia
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第13回:
【Core Week 12】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: International Relations: Japan's Security Alliance and the Peace Constitution
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第14回:
【Flex Hours】
Online class (task based)／《180minutes》
Theme: Feedback on Interactive Class with Japanese Students
トピック.授業外学習2: Beside the study required outside class specified above students will also have to summarize and present one of the class readings and write a text summary.

教科書/Required texts0: A reading list of relevant articles will be provided in the first class
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1

成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: Class Participation (20%); Presentation 1 (20%); Presentation 2 (20%); Text summary (40%)
成績評価Grading2: 備考　Note Class Participation (20%): Active participation in class discussions, including assigned homework.Presentation 1 (20%): Presentation of one of the class readings.Presentation 2 (20%): Group Presentation with Japanese Students.Text summary (40%): Summary of one of the assigned class readings.
備考Note0: You can contact the instructor under following email address: matthias.hennings@kwansei.ac.jp

name: 【300】総合日本学習科目（現代日本演習Ａ）　２／JSC Modern Japan Seminar A
成績評価備考:
備考　Note
Class Participation (20%): Active participation in class discussions, including assigned homework.
Presentation 1 (20%): Presentation of one of the class readings.
Presentation 2 (20%): Group Presentation with Japanese Students.
Text summary (40%): Summary of one of the assigned class readings.
